source_pr.title: ddl: fix data race in ddl.TestStat()
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
Fix data race in ddl.(*testStatSuite).TestStat()
```
WARNING: DATA RACE
Read at 0x00c000b240b0 by goroutine 31:
  github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl.(*ddl).asyncNotifyWorker()
      /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl/ddl.go:462 +0xfd
  github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl.(*ddl).doDDLJob()
      /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl/ddl.go:480 +0x17b
  github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl.(*testStatSuite).TestStat.func1()
      /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl/stat_test.go:74 +0x5c

Previous write at 0x00c000b240b0 by goroutine 94:
  github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl.(*ddl).start()
      /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl/ddl.go:367 +0x259
  github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl.(*testStatSuite).TestStat()
      /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl/stat_test.go:87 +0x71f
```

### What is changed and how it works?

Relate to #7203
Use `restartWorkers` instead of `start`. restartWorkers is like the function of d.start. But it won't initialize the "workers" and create a new worker.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test
